subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which is revealed unto thee from the sanctified realm by thy Lord, the Most Exalted, the Most High. Say: Verily, He is at this moment upon the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمع ما یوحی الیک من شطر القدس من لدن ربک العلی الاعلی قل انه حینئذ فی الافق
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @return of the Manifestations of God
